questionHtml: Jack takes a random sample of size 100 and calculates that x ¯ = 60.2 . Find an approximate 90 % confidence interval for μ .
markschemeHtml:
[59.9, 60.5]                   A1A1

Note: Accept answers which round to the correct 3sf answers.

[2 marks]

meta.title: Jack takes a random sample of size 100 and calculates that x ¯ = 60.2 . Find an approximate 90 % confidence interval for μ .
